subcodes.first_line: O concourse of the earth! Hearken unto My call, and be not of the heedless ones. The Promise hath come, and the Truth hath been made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ملا الارض ان استمعوا ندائی و لاتکونوا من الغافلین قد اتی الوعد و ظهر الحق ان
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @proclamation to the people of the world, @knowledge; recognition of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
